title: Polaris Pack
description: Polaris Pack animates some items in the game and will soon animate every item in the game. created by Oneberrynice (.ziraffe on discord)
body:
This pack animates some items in the game, with more to come in later updates.
This pack animates and or changes netherite tools, armour, buckets, and the sniffer. 

Please provide suggestions in our discord. It takes a long time to animate these, so downloading would be appreciated. 🙂

Check out [our YouTube channel!](https://www.youtube.com/@CelestialStudiosWork)
